intro.title: About RBI Regulations
intro.beforeLsp: QuikkRed is a digital lending platform powered by
intro.afterLsp: (Loan Service Provider). All loans on our platform are disbursed by
intro.afterNbfc: , an RBI-registered NBFC estab  lished in 1996 (CIN: U71290DL1996PTC081328).
intro.content2: The RBI has established comprehensive guidelines to ensure that NBFCs and their digital lending partners maintain financial stability, protect consumer interests, and follow ethical business practices. This page outlines the key RBI regulations applicable to our platform and our lending partner's operations.

partner1.title: Satsai Finlease Private Limited
highlightItems: Satsai Finlease is a registered NBFC under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
1996 (28+ years of financial services experience)
satsaifinlease.com
Maintains the minimum Net Owned Fund (NOF) as prescribed by the RBI.
Registration details available for verification on the RBI website.

partner2.title: Fluxusforge Private Limited (LSP)
highlightItems: Loan Service Provider (LSP) and Technology Partner operating the QuikkRed platform.
fluxusforge.in
Provides technology infrastructure, customer onboarding, and servicing support.
Operates under the regulatory framework established by RBI Digital Lending Guidelines, 2022.

subheading1.title: Key Provisions We Follow
highlightItems: All loan amounts are disbursed directly to the borrower's bank account without any pass-through or pool accounts.
All fees, charges, and annual percentage rates (APR) are disclosed upfront before loan sanction.
A standardized KFS is provided to borrowers containing all essential loan information.
Borrowers have the right to exit the loan within a specified look-up period.
Customer data is collected only with explicit consent and used solely for credit assessment and legitimate purposes.

subheading2.title: LSP Disclosure & Compliance
highlightItems: Fluxusforge Private Limited operates as the Lending Service Provider (LSP) for Satsai Finlease Private Limited.
All LSP details are disclosed to borrowers as part of the loan documentation.
LSP activities are monitored by Satsai Finlease to ensure compliance with RBI guidelines.

fairPracticeCode.title: Fair Practices Code
fairPracticeCode.introduction: In accordance with RBI Master Direction on Non-Banking Financial Company – Non-Systemically Important Non-Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2016, our lending partner Satsai Finlease Private Limited has adopted a comprehensive Fair Practices Code that governs:

conclusion.start: For detailed information, please refer to our

customerProtection.title: Customer Protection Framework
customerProtection.subtitle: Your Rights as a Borrower
highlightItems: Complete transparency on loan terms, interest rates, fees, and charges before signing any agreement.
Your personal and financial data is protected and used only for authorized purposes.
Respectful and dignified treatment at all stages of the loan lifecycle.
Access to a robust complaint resolution mechanism.
Option to prepay loans with applicable charges as per the loan agreement.

sections.title: Know Your Customer (KYC) Requirements
items: We follow RBI's Master Direction on KYC for customer identification and verification.
Video KYC (V-KYC) is conducted as per RBI guidelines for digital onboarding.
Aadhaar-based e-KYC is performed with explicit customer consent.
Periodic KYC updates are conducted as mandated by regulatory requirements.

sections.title: Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Framework
items: Robust transaction monitoring systems to detect suspicious activities.
Compliance with Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA), 2002.
Regular training of staff on AML/CFT requirements.
Reporting of suspicious transactions to Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU-IND).

footer.textBeforeLink: For detailed information, please refer to our

levels.title: Customer Support
levels.description: Contact our customer support team via email, phone, or in-app chat for initial complaint registration and resolution.

levels.title: Grievance Redressal Officer
levels.description: If not satisfied with Level 1 resolution, escalate to our designated Grievance Redressal Officer (GRO).

levels.title: RBI Ombudsman
levels.description: If still unresolved, customers can approach the RBI Ombudsman under the Integrated Ombudsman Scheme.

footer.textBeforeLink: For detailed information, please refer to our

keyRbiRegulations.title: Key RBI Regulations We Comply With

items.title: Master Direction - NBFC Directions, 2016
items.description: Comprehensive framework for NBFC operations, governance, and prudential norms.

items.title: Digital Lending Guidelines, 2022
items.description: Guidelines on digital lending by banks and NBFCs covering LSP regulations, data privacy, and customer protection.

items.title: Master Direction on KYC, 2016
items.description: Know Your Customer norms including e-KYC, V-KYC, and periodic updates.

items.title: Fair Practices Code for NBFCs
items.description: Guidelines ensuring fair treatment of customers in lending practices.

items.title: Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021
items.description: Unified grievance redressal mechanism for banking and financial services.

content.textBeforeLink: QuikkRed is a digital lending platform powered by Fluxusforge Private Limited (LSP). All loans are disbursed by Satsai Finlease Private Limited, an RBI-registered NBFC. This page provides a summary of key RBI guidelines applicable to our platform and lending partner's operations. For complete regulatory information, please refer to the official RBI website at
content.textAfterLink: The guidelines mentioned above are subject to updates and amendments by the RBI from time to time.
